case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LUCERO, MARCO

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PETITION MAILED ON JUN 19, 2000
